comments: Approved. The submitted review packet and drafted proposal (tasks/v0.7-ratification-final-review-packet.md) strictly adhere to the constraints of a draft proposal. The document explicitly includes the required governance breach packet reference, the proposed decision text, the exact proposed diff for SYSTEM_PROMPT.md, the proposed dispatch/iteration-state changes, and the rationale for ratification. Furthermore, an inspection of the repository state confirms that NO active implementation files (e.g., SYSTEM_PROMPT.md), workflow states (e.g., dispatch.json), or new governance artifacts were modified or created by this execution; all prior unauthorized state transitions and governance patches have been cleanly rolled back pending explicit human authorization.
